user_query: My company is organizing a charity event and we need to send out email invitations to potential donors. Can you recommend any reliable email marketing services that offer advanced analytics and tracking features? Additionally, we want to provide healthy snacks for the attendees. Can you give us the nutritional analysis for the proposed snack options?

TaskList.description: Research and identify reliable email marketing services that offer advanced analytics and tracking features.
Send out email invitations to potential donors using the selected email marketing service.
Compile a list of proposed healthy snack options for attendees.
Perform nutritional analysis for the proposed snack options.
